rule_summary: Study-specific compiler rules for the Olova / Ohnuki long-window bulk trajectory family. These rules preserve that the family is one of the benchmark's strongest current age-linked temporal anchors, while still forcing abstention-capable interpretation because late identity and risk remain bulk-limited.

conditions.condition_summary: Long-window bulk trajectory with strong age movement but coarse late-phase identity and risk support.
source_locators: Long-window age-linked movement under reprogramming progression
Bulk-only late identity and risk support
conditions.rule_basis: Treat Olova / Ohnuki as the benchmark's strongest long-window maturation bulk family for age-linked movement, while preserving explicit abstention pressure because late identity retention and risk do not resolve at single-cell level.
